testsuite.name: com.tests.LoginTest

testcase.name: verifyLoggedInUserCanViewOrderOrPurchaseHistory

failure.message: Order or purchase history option is missing. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Order or purchase history option is missing. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tests.LoginTest.verifyLoggedInUserCanViewOrderOrPurchaseHistory(LoginTest.java:374) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
testcase.system-out: DEFECT: Order or purchase history option is not available for logged-in user.

testcase.name: verifyLoggedInUserCanViewSavedPaymentOrBillingDetails

failure.message: Saved payment or billing details option is missing. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Saved payment or billing details option is missing. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tests.LoginTest.verifyLoggedInUserCanViewSavedPaymentOrBillingDetails(LoginTest.java:405) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.name: verifyFieldsClearedAfterCloseAndReopen

failure.message: Username field retained old value after reopening. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Username field retained old value after reopening. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tests.LoginTest.verifyFieldsClearedAfterCloseAndReopen(LoginTest.java:238) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.name: verifyForgotPasswordOptionAvailable

failure.message: Forgot Password option is missing. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Forgot Password option is missing. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tests.LoginTest.verifyForgotPasswordOptionAvailable(LoginTest.java:286) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.system-out: PASS: Alert message text is displayed correctly: Please fill out Username and Password.

testcase.name: verifyLoggedInUserCanChangePassword

failure.message: Change password option is missing. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: verifyValidationWhenUsernameBlank
testcase.system-out: PASS: Correct validation alert displayed when Username is blank: Please fill out Username and Password.

testcase.name: verifyValidationWhenPasswordBlank
testcase.system-out: PASS: Correct validation alert displayed when Password is blank: Please fill out Username and Password.

testcase.name: verifyLoginSucceedsForEachValidUsernameAndPassword
testcase.system-out: PASS: Login succeeded for valid credentials. Username: priyankapriya PASS: Welcome text is displayed correctly after login for user: priyankapriya INFO: Logged out successfully.

testcase.name: verifyClickingLoginLinkOpensLoginModal
testcase.system-out: PASS: Clicking the Login link opens the Login modal.

testcase.name: verifyUsernameAndPasswordLabels
testcase.system-out: PASS: Username label is displayed correctly: Username: PASS: Password label is displayed correctly: Password:

testcase.name: verifyPasswordFieldProvidesShowHideOption

failure.message: Show/Hide password option is missing. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Show/Hide password option is missing. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tests.LoginTest.verifyPasswordFieldProvidesShowHideOption(LoginTest.java:423) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.name: verifyLoginModalContainsButtons

PASS: Sign up button is visible in signup modal. PASS: Clicking Sign up opens signup modal. DEFECT: Weak credentials were accepted or not properly rejected. Username: test, Password: 123, Alert: This user already exist. PASS: About modal opens successfully. PASS: All product category links are visible. PASS: Brand logo text is displayed correctly: PRODUCT STORE PASS: Carousel contains exactly 3 slides. PASS: Carousel Next button changes the active slide. PASS: Carousel Previous button changes the active slide back. PASS: Homepage carousel is visible on page load. PASS: Clicking Cart navigates user to the cart page. PASS: Clicking Home keeps user on home page and products are displayed. PASS: Contact modal opens successfully. PASS: Each category filter returns at least one product. PASS: Laptops category displays products. Product count: 6 PASS: Logout link is not visible before login. PASS: All main navigation bar links are visible on page load. PASS: Monitors category displays products. Product count: 2 PASS: Page title contains STORE. Actual title: STORE PASS: Phones category displays products. Product count: 9 PASS: Product cards are loaded and visible on the home page initially. PASS: Phones, Laptops and Monitors category links are visible. PASS: Clicking Next changes the product list. PASS: Each category returns at least one product. PASS: Laptops category displays products. Count: 6 PASS: Laptops category shows relevant laptop products. PASS: Monitors category displays products. Count: 2 PASS: Monitors category shows relevant monitor products. PASS: Next pagination button is visible. PASS: Phones category displays products. Count: 7 PASS: Phones category shows relevant phone products. PASS: Clicking Previous changes the product list after navigating Next. PASS: Product cards are visible on initial load. PASS: Product category section is visible. PASS: Switching between categories updates the product list. PASS: Add to cart button is displayed on product details page. PASS: Add to cart success alert displayed: Product added PASS: Clicked product matches details page product name: Samsung galaxy s6 PASS: Laptops category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Monitors category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Phones category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Product description is displayed on product details page. PASS: Product details page URL is correct: https://demoblaze.com/prod.html?idp_=1 PASS: Product image is displayed on product details page. PASS: Product name is displayed on product details page. PASS: Product price is displayed on product details page. PASS: Cart total is displayed after product is added.
